title: CTM George going for Best Tile Shop a third time
description: BUSINESS NEWS - CTM George is thrilled to...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - CTM George is thrilled to have been nominated for the Best of George Readers’ Choice Award for the third year in a row.


> Having been voted the Best Tile Shop for the previous two years, adding Best Tile and Flooring Company in 2024, this nomination speaks to the excellence of our products and our service.


Our inspiration Giovanni Ravazotti, founder of the Italtile group - of which CTM is a vital part - continues to inspire us to work passionately. Coming to South Africa from Italy more than 50 years ago, he was astounded by the limited choice offered to South Africans to beautify their homes, and decided to be the change by importing stylish Italian tiles himself.

Italtile group – 54 years laterFast forward 54 years, the Italtile group - through his hard work, passion, and vision - is now the biggest in the business. Italtile consists of three retail brands, CTM, Italtile and Top T. The group also has an integrated supply chain that supplies to us and our competitors.

Our journeyOur CTM George journey started in 2009. Notwithstanding droughts, fires, economic challenges, and a pandemic, our customers have supported us through thick and thin, and we are very, very thankful to them.

We always strive to provide them with the best service, best quality and best products at the most affordable prices - as is expected from our brand! In 2013, due to the growth of our brand in George, we relocated to our new, bigger building opposite Kraaibosch Estate.

This was the best move we could have made. It allowed us to stock a wider range and provide our customers with a beautiful shopping experience and ample parking. Thankfully, our existing customers stuck with us, new customers joined us and friendships have been formed over the years.

Our staffOur company’s priority is customer service. Our staff members mainly contribute to the business it is today, each bringing their unique personalities, skills, and work ethic to the table. We are so grateful to our dedicated staff, who make it their mission to make our business a success, bringing their A game to work, day in and day out.

Our valuesIntegrity is one of our most important values. We won’t let an opportunity pass to assist our customers, sharing our know-how and ensuring their choice is best suited to their needs. Our staff training enables our team to assist customers, no matter what their needs are.

Our customers To our customers - you are the heart of our business! Without you, there would be no us. Thank you for trusting us with all your building, development, renovation, and DIY needs. A huge thank you for your loyal support over the years.

Now is the time to turn the nomination into another win. Please remember to visit https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/ and vote for us again!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
